project_goal: Maintain exactly 400 ADHD × AI content packs by continuously collecting evidence, scoring new angles, upgrading weak packs, and recording replacement candidates without silently overwriting published assets.

curated_sources.title: CDC ADHD Data and Statistics
curated_sources.summary: ADHD diagnosis and treatment estimates vary by data source; useful for AI diagnosis boundary and dataset-bias arguments.

curated_sources.title: NIMH Attention-Deficit/Hyperactivity Disorder
curated_sources.summary: ADHD remains a medical diagnosis and support/treatment topic; AI should be framed as external executive scaffolding, not a cure.

curated_sources.title: Job Accommodation Network ADHD Accommodation Ideas
curated_sources.summary: Workplace ADHD friction can be reframed as task, communication, environment, and feedback-interface design, supporting Agentic AI as digital accommodation.

curated_sources.title: Microsoft Neurodiversity Hiring Program
curated_sources.summary: Neurodiversity hiring is organizational interface design, not a charity story; useful for AI hiring and workplace system articles.

curated_sources.title: EEOC Guidance on Adverse Impact in Software, Algorithms, and AI
curated_sources.summary: AI employment tools cannot be assumed neutral; they should be assessed for adverse impact, including disability and neurodiversity concerns.

scoring_dimensions.pain_intensity: Does this hit a specific high-variance ADHD pain instead of generic productivity advice?
scoring_dimensions.adhd_ai_intersection: Does it explain a real intersection between executive function and AI or Agentic AI?
scoring_dimensions.evidence_strength: Does it provide paper, policy, data, product, organization case, or user quote evidence?
scoring_dimensions.product_entry_potential: Can it become a template, checklist, prompt, table, agent, or service entry?
scoring_dimensions.feedback_potential: Will readers comment with concrete problems or ask for usable artifacts?
